title: ligularia microcardia
intro: Ligularia microcardia, also known as the small-leaved ligularia, is a perennial plant that belongs to the daisy family. It is a native Chinese herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, sore throats, and digestive problems, due to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation and promoting immune function. Ligularia microcardia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for consumption, and its roots can also be dried and used in traditional medicine.
